2026-04-15 · 08:17 UTC

Iran demands $270bn war compensation as second round of US‑Iran talks loom; China‑Iran military cooperation escalates with reported use of Chinese spy satellite to target US bases. Confidence: HIGH.

Hezbollah storms Israeli military position overnight despite historic Israel‑Lebanon direct talks; Israel building buffer zone inside Lebanon while negotiating. Confidence: HIGH.

Italy suspends defence agreement with Israel—first EU country to take this step, signaling European backlash intensifying. Confidence: HIGH.
